_fixture_note: Trimmed Yahoo v1-search response, mirroring the live schema of GET https://query2.finance.yahoo.com/v1/finance/search?q=NVDA&newsCount=10&quotesCount=0 . Authored to the documented field shape (title/link/publisher/providerPublishTime/uuid/relatedTickers) because the live capture host was IP-rate-limited (HTTP 429) at fixture time. relatedTickers preserves the documented contamination behaviour: the query ticker (NVDA) is injected into every item, subject-first otherwise. Junk symbols (2454.TW foreign, ^GSPC index, BRK-B class share, BTC-USD crypto) are included to exercise normalization.
